name: Candle (Rust ML)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT/Apache 2.0); HuggingFace project; no API costs

auth.notes: Local library; HuggingFace Hub token for model downloads

performance.notes: Near-native performance; CUDA backend for GPU; Metal for Apple Silicon; zero Python overhead

agent_readiness.notes: HuggingFace's minimalist Rust ML framework for efficient inference. Run LLMs, Whisper, BERT, Stable Diffusion in pure Rust without Python. CUDA/Metal backends. Ideal for serverless edge deployments, production Rust applications, and WASM inference. Supports HuggingFace Hub model loading. Less feature-complete than PyTorch but zero Python dependency overhead.

gotchas: Rust expertise required — high learning curve
Less model coverage than Python ecosystem
best_when: Production Rust applications needing embedded ML inference
Serverless/edge deployments where Python is unavailable
Microservices needing LLM inference without Python overhead
avoid_when: Research and prototyping (Python faster to iterate)
summary: Candle is HuggingFace's minimalist Rust ML framework for efficient inference. Run LLMs, Whisper, BERT, and Stable Diffusion in pure Rust without Python. CUDA/Metal backends. Zero Python overhead. HuggingFace Hub integration. Best for production Rust services, serverless edge deployments, and WASM inference where Python dependency is unacceptable.
